title: GridType Property
description: Specifies a type of grids displayed in the vision sequence.
notes:
Specifies a type of the grids displayed in the vision sequence.

Note: If millimeter is specified in the GridUnits property, the grids are displayed only when calibration specified by the sequence is completed.
